name: django-nested-modals

metadata.name: django-nested-modals
metadata.summary: Django app to implement Bootstrap nested modals

documentation:
[![PyPI version](https://badge.fury.io/py/django-nested-modals.svg)](https://badge.fury.io/py/django-nested-modals)

Add to installed apps in settings   
`'bootstrap_modals',`
    

Add to template
  
    <script src="{% static 'django_modals/js/modals.js' %}"></script>
    <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="{% static 'django_modals/css/modals.css' %}"/>

####See django_examples for example usage

functions.name: django_modals.url_helper.get_urls
documentation: Can create all url patterns in a module that are subclasses of BaseModal
Add the modal view module to url_patterns e.g
and place the line below at the end of the file with the modal views

classes.name: django_modals.modals.DictGetList
documentation: Adds getlist to dict to make dict work more like Django's MultiValueDict
